delta_policy.formula: max(1e-12, maximum absolute Panel A matched-null margin)

epsilon_mu.role: existing metric-sheet denominator floor; not a scientific-effect threshold

panel_a_rules.calibration_case_identity: case_id plus pair_id; seed is an inert schema-compatible alias

route: construct complete typed raw W/O/E response records
reconstruct exact bytes and semantic projection

panel_e_validity_missingness: valid field_limited_refusal with negative mu is included
invalid arm makes its required pair nonevaluable
one valid and one invalid arm never permits surviving-arm substitution
mu/disposition sign mismatch is invalid rather than scientific
eligible-zero and same-side movement remain valid when complete records validate

forbidden_inputs: PyGRC imports, models, snapshots, runtime values, or execution
candidate artifacts, outcomes, seeds, values, topology, schedules, or configuration
I03 conformance fixture topology, values, outcomes, split, digests, or margins
N31 candidate outputs or provider observations
earlier-lane calibration values or outputs as numeric inputs
scientific controls disguised as arithmetic nulls

closeout_rules.blocked_incomplete_or_missing_surface: unavailable scientific legs may remain only when each is explicit and no support or refutation is inferred from absence
closeout_rules.every_closeout: all source, identity, reconstruction, ownership, fixture-lock, and terminal-language guards resolved
closeout_rules.not_supported: every claim-mandatory scientific leg completed with valid evidence
closeout_rules.supported_rung_or_tag: every leg mandatory for the rung or tag resolved without a claim-blocking disposition

common_control_legs.description: conceptual motivation remains non-runtime and non-ecology evidence
N30 retains original trace-mediated eligibility ceiling
N29 components cannot substitute for fresh P2-I3 composition evidence
participant and field identities remain separate
ordered OP-01 through OP-05 chain rather than passive environment
exclude private and global routing
surface dependence through withdrawal relocation shuffle and false trace
ordered formation field dynamic and encounter handoff
omit B-R export policy under registered comparison
omit or neutralize lifecycle scheduling separately from the O arm
verify blind encounter adapter boundary
classify composite coordination dependence by producer-cost class
verify nonzero attributable formation cost
global native plus in-flight coherence conservation
detect unregistered leakage
verify isolated reservoir has no continuation influence
separate export mass from organization specificity
preserve parent-context and motif/regime claim prohibition
no registered parent basin exists in the B-R realization
separate source carrier reservoir continuation participant and route roles
enforce bounded trail and stigmergic vocabulary
keep Q-021 branch comparison distinct from seven-lane successor ranking
ecology demand is never native substrate evidence
constructed B-R remains RCAE until explicit native transition and rerun
construction completeness necessity minimality counterfactual and debt
exact live PyGRC binding and no fallback
before and after state receipts and runtime identity reconstruct
fixture cannot become motif regime or domain package
completion-sensitive terminal classification

control_governance.diagnostic_resolution_rule: a control resolves when valid evidence distinguishes and classifies alternatives; preferred direction is not required

false_trace_interpretation.carrier_matched_divergence: omitted current state versus active history remains unresolved
false_trace_interpretation.carrier_matched_reproduction: supports carrier-value sufficiency for the tested encounter only

lane_control_legs.description: W versus E deposition withdrawal with cost and attribution
relocate complete carrier and continuation state
role-preserving raw-ID permutation without route labels
match C(m_e) and encounter while removing valid depositor history
match every continuation-causal field except formation lineage and cost
fixed branch-local requests without shared selector
forbid cross-route field history label and outcome reads
same-participant evidence cannot receive stigmergic tag

P2-I3-BR-CTRL-01-LEG-01-CONCEPTUAL-PROVE.claim_effect: conceptual sources remain motivation only; failure blocks their use as runtime or ecology evidence without changing independent fresh evidence
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-01-LEG-01-CONCEPTUAL-PROVE.invalidity_effect: block source-derived claim and affected evidence only
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-01-LEG-01-CONCEPTUAL-PROVE.unavailability_effect: blocked or missing-surface source disposition with no support or refutation

P2-I3-BR-CTRL-02-LEG-01-N30-CEILING.claim_effect: blocks relabeling inherited N30 evidence as a fresh P2-I3 ecology result
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-02-LEG-01-N30-CEILING.invalidity_effect: block source-ceiling claim and affected terminal wording only
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-02-LEG-01-N30-CEILING.unavailability_effect: blocked source-ceiling closeout with no support or refutation

P2-I3-BR-CTRL-03-LEG-01-N29-COMPONENT-CO.claim_effect: blocks treating inherited components as fresh evidence for the composed OP-01-through-OP-05 relation
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-03-LEG-01-N29-COMPONENT-CO.invalidity_effect: block composed ecology claim while preserving separately valid component observations
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-03-LEG-01-N29-COMPONENT-CO.unavailability_effect: blocked source-composition closeout with no support or refutation

P2-I3-BR-CTRL-04-LEG-01-PARTICIPANT-FIEL.claim_effect: blocks participant-relative and field-mediated interpretation when participant and field identities are not independent
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-04-LEG-01-PARTICIPANT-FIEL.invalidity_effect: invalidate affected causal-chain evidence while preserving unrelated structural observations
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-04-LEG-01-PARTICIPANT-FIEL.unavailability_effect: blocked boundary or missing-surface closeout with no support or refutation

P2-I3-BR-CTRL-04-LEG-02-CAUSAL-CHAIN.claim_effect: non-supportive valid outcomes classify the chain; absence of an ordered OP-01-through-OP-05 relation blocks R03 and higher without erasing lower observations
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-04-LEG-02-CAUSAL-CHAIN.invalidity_effect: invalidate the affected causal comparison only
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-04-LEG-02-CAUSAL-CHAIN.unavailability_effect: blocked or missing-surface closeout with no support or refutation

P2-I3-BR-CTRL-05-LEG-01-NONPRIVATE-LOCAL.claim_effect: private or global routing blocks the non-private route-local field interpretation
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-05-LEG-01-NONPRIVATE-LOCAL.unavailability_effect: blocked locality or missing-surface closeout with no support or refutation

P2-I3-BR-CTRL-06-LEG-01-SURFACE-DEPENDEN.claim_effect: valid generic or counterdirectional outcomes classify surface dependence; failure to isolate the surface blocks R04 specificity
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-06-LEG-01-SURFACE-DEPENDEN.unavailability_effect: blocked intervention or missing-surface closeout with no support or refutation

P2-I3-BR-CTRL-07-LEG-01-ORDERED-COMPOSIT.claim_effect: temporal co-occurrence without ordered handoffs blocks the composed field-to-encounter claim
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-07-LEG-01-ORDERED-COMPOSIT.unavailability_effect: blocked handoff or missing-surface closeout with no support or refutation

P2-I3-BR-CTRL-08-LEG-01-EXPORT-POLICY-OM.claim_effect: classifies export-producer dependence without invalidating an honestly constructed observation; dependence blocks a native qualifier
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-08-LEG-01-EXPORT-POLICY-OM.unavailability_effect: blocked producer-dependence or missing-surface closeout with no support or refutation

P2-I3-BR-CTRL-08-LEG-02-LIFECYCLE-SCHEDU.claim_effect: classifies lifecycle-schedule dependence separately from O-arm export neutralization and preserves an honestly constructed result
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-08-LEG-02-LIFECYCLE-SCHEDU.unavailability_effect: blocked schedule-dependence or missing-surface closeout with no support or refutation

P2-I3-BR-CTRL-08-LEG-03-ENCOUNTER-ADAPTE.claim_effect: field-reading or outcome-authoring adapter behavior blocks the local native-encounter interpretation
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-08-LEG-03-ENCOUNTER-ADAPTE.invalidity_effect: invalidate affected encounter evidence while preserving unrelated field observations
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-08-LEG-03-ENCOUNTER-ADAPTE.unavailability_effect: blocked adapter-boundary or missing-surface closeout with no support or refutation

P2-I3-BR-CTRL-08-LEG-04-COMPOSITE-COORDI.claim_effect: classifies coordination dependence by producer-cost class without automatically invalidating constructed evidence
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-08-LEG-04-COMPOSITE-COORDI.invalidity_effect: invalidate affected composite handoff evidence only
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-08-LEG-04-COMPOSITE-COORDI.unavailability_effect: blocked composition or missing-surface closeout with no support or refutation

P2-I3-BR-CTRL-09-LEG-01-FORMATION-COST.claim_effect: nonzero attributable cost supports the formation prerequisite; cost failure blocks R01 and higher while preserving preformation observations
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-09-LEG-01-FORMATION-COST.unavailability_effect: blocked cost or missing-surface closeout with no support or refutation

P2-I3-BR-CTRL-09-LEG-02-GLOBAL-CONSERVAT.claim_effect: conservation failure permits no scientific result from the affected execution
P2-I3-BR-CTRL-09-LEG-02-GLOBAL-CONSERVAT.unavailability_effect: blocked execution or missing-surface closeout with no support or refutation

o_arm_and_producer_omission.O_arm: retains eligible receipts producer invocation schedule and lifecycle checkpoints while neutralizing the designated native export request
o_arm_and_producer_omission.producer_omission_control: removes one registered causally necessary producer item

sequencing.I09: resolve scientific comparisons and pre-terminal guards, emit control index, arm terminal guards
sequencing.I10: reconstruct every evidence binding and I09 disposition; block I11 on mismatch
sequencing.I11: consume reconstructed I09 facts, validate terminal overlay, never change I09 numeric or scientific facts

estimator.aggregation: one registered encounter j supplies each primary pair; additional opportunities are separate trajectory panels
estimator.denominator_tie_rule: epsilon_mu owns equality at the floor; otherwise first_arm owns exact equal magnitudes
estimator.missingness: an invalid required arm makes only its pair nonevaluable; no imputation, averaging, or surviving-arm substitution
estimator.relation_tie_rule: exact equal valid arms produce canonical positive zero and remain a valid equivalent relation for later ladder interpretation

canonical_arithmetic_response_constructi.exact_requirement: for every arm c_pre_m_e - q_probe equals the registered exact rational margin
canonical_arithmetic_response_constructi.scientific_reuse: mechanically prohibited from I06 and I08 scientific registration

required_before_invocation: one exact canonical arithmetic response construction satisfying the frozen construction contract

gate_boundary.next_on_acceptance: open construction of a separately frozen candidate-blind I05 calibration invocation only

interpretation_ladder.threshold_role: numeric resolution and developmental interpretation guidance only

observation_cadence.event_basis: system-internal LGRC9V3 event and settled lifecycle order only
field_dynamic_checkpoints: after every settled attributable formation event
immediately after selected B-R export settlement
immediately before encounter request is the next native event
observation_cadence.timescale_justification: B-R is event-indexed; observing every qualifying formation and export settlement plus the adjacent encounter boundary resolves the selected dynamic without importing external wall time

panels.role: typed mu and native disposition for W/O/E pairs
formation and B-R export state trajectory with eligible-zero/floor classification
native structure/time observations plus separately typed derived annotations
formation cost global conservation leakage reservoir and producer-cost vector
withdrawal lifecycle clamps mass history relocation false trace hidden-router and variation comparisons

observation_policies.variation_rule: geometry or internal-timescale variation is a registered intervention factor; annotations alone cannot establish consequence

primary_response.encounter_index: j indexes encounter opportunity, not lifecycle receipt k
primary_response.observation_boundary: after request scheduling and immediately before the request is the next native event capable of testing or changing m_e
primary_response.validity_domain: structurally valid registered request and native event boundary
